name: 16" Metal Bronze Wall Clock - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Modern Aluminum, Analog Display, Indoor Use
description:
Uplift your indoor decor with the 16" Metal Bronze Wall Clock from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This stylish round clock features an off-white analog display that blends right into any modern interior and brings all the classic vibes to your space. Crafted from aluminum, it is elegant and durable for prolonged use.

Threshold™ w/ Studio Mcgee: Looks like home, feels like you.
